title: trond config diff output
description: Returned by `trond config diff --intent <path> -o json`. Compares the rendered HOCON for the intent against the deployed copy on disk. Three top-level shapes are possible — disambiguate via the `status` field.

oneOf.title: Not yet deployed
oneOf.description: Returned when there is no managed node by that name; the entire intent would be new.

oneOf.title: Deployed config not readable
oneOf.description: Returned when the node is managed but the deployed .conf file can't be read (e.g. ~/.trond/deployments was wiped); diff cannot be computed.

oneOf.title: Diffable
oneOf.description: Returned when both versions exist; carries a line-level diff array with classic `+ ` / `- ` prefixes.

items.description: One diff line; `+ ` prefix = added, `- ` prefix = removed.
